summary.key_theme: 公司在 AI 與航太領域的技術合作持續擴張，但短期面臨財報獲利預期下滑與股價回檔的壓力。

bullish.title: Synopsys Partners with TSMC to Power Next-Generation AI Systems with Silicon Proven IP and Certified EDA Flows
bullish.reason: 與台積電深化合作，強化 AI 晶片設計流程與 IP 認證，鞏固其在半導體生態系的護城河。

bullish.title: Atomera Extends Collaboration With Synopsys to Accelerate GaN Modeling in High-Value RF and Power Devices
bullish.reason: 擴大與 Atomera 的合作，針對氮化鎵 (GaN) 進行建模優化，有助於提升在射頻與電源管理晶片市場的競爭力。

bullish.title: A Look At Synopsys (SNPS) Valuation As NASA Spacesuit Deal Highlights Expanding Aerospace And AI Reach
bullish.reason: 透過 NASA 登月任務的模擬工具合約，驗證了公司軟體在航太與極端環境模擬領域的技術領先地位。

bearish.title: Synopsys’ Quarterly Earnings Preview: What You Need to Know
bearish.reason: 市場預期即將公布的第二季財報將出現雙位數獲利下滑，引發投資人對短期獲利能力的擔憂。

bearish.title: Synopsys (SNPS) Sees a More Significant Dip Than Broader Market: Some Facts to Know
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 4.28%，表現弱於大盤，顯示短期賣壓沉重且技術面轉弱。

neutral.title: Is Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
neutral.reason: 僅為投資觀點彙整，未提供具體財務數據更新，屬於市場情緒觀察。

neutral.title: Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅指出該股近期受到市場關注，未涉及實質基本面變動。
